subcodes.title: Cablegram
subcodes.first_line: He who sits with leper catches leprosy. He who is with Christ shuns Pharisees and abhors Judas Iscariots.
subcodes.first_line_orig: هر کسی با ابرص میبشیند مرض برص میگیرد کسی که با مسیح است از
subcodes.subjects: @avoidance of Covenant-Breakers, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @early Christian persecutions; the Pharisees, @Judas
